title: Dünyanın En Güzel Annesi
description: Annenize özel, kişiselleştirilmiş bir hediye kitap. Sulu boya tarzında illüstrasyonlarla dolu, duygusal ve anlamlı. 14 sahnede bir ömrün hikayesi.
style: Soft dreamy watercolor painting illustration, delicate pastel pink lavender and cream colors, gentle flowing brushstrokes, floral botanical elements, romantic ethereal atmosphere, fine art watercolor on textured paper, warm soft natural lighting, elegant feminine aesthetic
coverPrompt: CHARACTER_DESC standing in a beautiful sunlit garden surrounded by blooming pink roses and white peonies, holding a bouquet of fresh flowers close to her heart with a warm radiant smile, soft golden morning light creating a gentle halo effect, butterflies dancing around, delicate flower petals floating in the breeze, a charming garden archway covered in climbing roses behind her, soft dreamy watercolor painting illustration, delicate pastel pink lavender and cream colors, gentle flowing brushstrokes, romantic ethereal poster composition, ultra high detail render quality

characterDescription.base: Turkish child. Exact face, hair, skin tone, and accessories come from the character-profile reference photo. No hardcoded physical traits — the reference photo is the sole source of truth for identity.
characterDescription.notes: Sulu boya tarzında anne karakteri, sıcak ve duygusal. Her sahnede aynı yüz özellikleri korunmalı. Referans fotoğraf birden fazla kişi içeriyorsa, sadece ANNE olan YAŞLI kadına odaklanılmalı.

scenes.title: Her Sey Seninle Basladi
scenes.text: {RECIPIENT_NAME}... Bu ismi her söylediğimde kalbim gülumsedi. Seni düşününce içimde sıcacık bir rüzgar eser, gözlerimin önüne hep o bildik gülümsemen gelir. Sen hayatıma adımını attığın ilk andan itibaren her şeyi güzel kıldın {NICKNAME}. Sabahlarımı aydınlatan, gecelerimi huzurla dolduran, kalbimi sevgiyle sarmalayan hep sen oldun. Bu kitap sana -- kalbimin en derin köşesinden, kelimelere sığınamayan duyguların kitabı. Çünkü sen dünyanın en güzel annesisin ve bu hikaye senin hikayen.
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC standing in a serene sunlit doorway of a charming European cottage-style home, CAMERA AT EYE LEVEL from slight diagonal, captured in a moment of peaceful radiant morning beauty. She is leaning gently against the weathered wooden door frame with one hand lightly touching the antique brass door handle, wearing a comfortable flowing cream-colored linen dress with delicate lace trim at the neckline, a soft rose-pink cashmere cardigan draped loosely over her shoulders. Her face shows the most beautiful warm welcoming natural smile, eyes twinkling with quiet joy and the deep contentment of someone surrounded by love, as if she is greeting the viewer -- her child -- at the door with open arms and an open heart. The cottage doorway is framed by the most magnificent climbing roses in soft blush pink and creamy white, their abundant blooms cascading down both sides of the weathered stone archway creating a natural floral frame of extraordinary beauty, with tiny green tendrils and leaves winding through the old grey stone. Morning sunlight streams in from behind the viewer, illuminating her face and the roses with the most gorgeous warm golden glow, creating a soft halo effect around her silhouette. The doorstep beneath her feet is made of worn honey-colored flagstone with tiny tufts of chamomile and thyme growing between the cracks, releasing implied fragrance with every step. To her left a large antique terracotta pot overflows with trailing lavender and white trailing geraniums, their scent mixing with the roses. A small wrought-iron bistro table beside the door holds a hand-painted ceramic vase with freshly cut garden flowers -- pink peonies, white daisies, sprigs of eucalyptus -- and a steaming cup of Turkish tea in a traditional tulip glass on a brass saucer, its amber liquid catching the morning light. A worn welcome mat with faded floral pattern sits at the threshold. Through the door behind her, the warm interior of the home is partially visible -- soft cream walls, a vintage mirror with a gilded frame, a hook with a well-worn garden hat and a basket of fresh herbs. Two small sparrows perch on the rose-covered archway above, their tiny heads tilted in curiosity. The garden path leading to the door is lined with blooming lavender bushes and bordered by low box hedges, with a weathered wooden garden gate visible in the soft-focus background. Scattered rose petals in pink and cream dot the flagstone path like nature's own welcome carpet. The entire scene radiates the most extraordinary warmth, welcome, and the feeling of coming home to unconditional love -- every element carefully composed to suggest this is a woman whose very presence transforms a house into a sanctuary of love and belonging. Soft dreamy watercolor painting illustration with the most delicate pastel pink lavender cream ivory and warm golden tones, gentle flowing organic brushstrokes with visible watercolor texture and soft organic color bleeds at edges, abundant floral botanical elements woven throughout every corner of the composition, romantic ethereal atmosphere of a perfect peaceful morning greeting, fine art watercolor on heavily textured cold-pressed paper with visible tooth and grain, warm soft golden natural morning lighting with gentle lens flare, elegant feminine aesthetic with incredible emotional depth and tenderness

scenes.title: Senin Ellerin
scenes.text: Senin ellerin hep sıcaktı {NICKNAME}. Birlikte {SHARED_ACTIVITY} yaparken o ellerin nasıl da ustaca hareket ettiğini hayranlıkla izlerdim. O eller ki, beni besledi, saçlarımı taradı, ateşim çıktığında alnımı tuttu. O eller ki, yorgunluktan titrediğinde bile beni hiç bırakmadı. Senin ellerin dünyanın en güzel şiiri -- her dokunuşun bir ninni, her okşamanın bir dua gibiydi. Yıllar geçti, o eller belki yoruldu, belki kırışıklar arttı -- ama benim için o eller hala dünyanın en sıcak, en güvenli limanı. {SHARED_ACTIVITY} yaparken bile o ellerin hep benim için bir hikaye anlatırdı.
scenes.prompt: A deeply intimate and emotionally powerful close-up composition centered on CHARACTER_DESC's beautiful weathered loving hands, CAMERA CLOSE-UP focusing on face and upper body, captured in extraordinary tender detail that tells the story of a lifetime of love and care. The hands are the absolute focal point of the image, positioned in the center of the composition, palms slightly upward in an open generous gesture of giving and nurturing, fingers gently curved as if they have just finished a tender caress or are about to offer comfort. These are real lived-in hands with fine delicate lines and gentle creases that map years of work love and devotion, soft warm sun-kissed skin with subtle natural age spots that speak of summers in the garden, neatly trimmed natural nails. On the ring finger sits a simple thin gold wedding band worn smooth by decades of wear, catching the warm light with a soft gleam. The hands rest on a surface covered with a vintage hand-embroidered white linen cloth with delicate floral patterns in pastel pink and sage green thread. In the soft-focus background behind the hands, there are warm visual hints of the shared activity {SHARED_ACTIVITY} -- tools, materials, or elements associated with this beloved activity visible but gently blurred, suggesting these hands have just paused from doing something deeply meaningful and cherished together. Scattered around and near the hands are symbolic objects representing a lifetime of nurturing: a worn wooden cooking spoon with a honey-colored patina, a small child's knitted bootie in the softest pale yellow wool kept as a treasured keepsake, a single fresh pink rose with morning dew on its petals, a tiny framed photograph of a baby's hand gripping an adult finger, and a folded handkerchief with embroidered initials. Warm late afternoon golden hour sunlight pours in from the left side of the frame, creating beautiful long shadows and illuminating the hands with the most gorgeous warm amber glow that makes the skin seem to radiate warmth and life, every fine line and gentle wrinkle highlighted with loving golden light. The background is intentionally soft and dreamy, a warm bokeh blur in cream and sage and rose tones, keeping all attention on the sacred beauty of these hands. Tiny floating particles of dust catch the golden light around the hands creating a subtle halo effect. Small botanical details frame the composition -- dried lavender sprigs, pressed flowers in a corner, a tiny sprig of rosemary. The overall mood is one of profound reverence for the hands that built a life, raised children, healed wounds, held a family together through everything, and lovingly engaged in {SHARED_ACTIVITY} countless times. Soft dreamy watercolor painting illustration with hyper-detailed focus on the hands rendered in warm realistic watercolor tones of peach golden amber soft rose and cream, gentle flowing brushstrokes that become looser and more impressionistic toward the edges creating a vignette effect, delicate botanical watercolor elements framing the corners including pressed flowers and trailing vines, romantic ethereal atmosphere of sacred intimacy, fine art watercolor on premium textured cold-pressed paper with visible grain, warm soft golden hour natural side lighting with beautiful shadow play, elegant feminine aesthetic with raw emotional power and reverence for maternal love
scenes.setting: Yakin cekim, annenin elleri, aktivite izleri

scenes.title: Senin Dunyan
scenes.text: Sen {RECIPIENT_HOBBY} yaparken gözlerindeki o ışığı hep sevdim {NICKNAME}. O anlarda sen sadece anne, sadece eş, sadece evlat değildin -- sen kendindin, en saf en özgür halindin. Dünyanın yükleri omuzlarından kayar, yüzünde çocuksu bir sevinç belirir, gözlerin parlardı. {RECIPIENT_HOBBY} yaparken zamanın nasıl akıp gittiğini fark etmezdin bile. Senin o halini görmek beni ne kadar mutlu ettiğini bilemezsin. Çünkü senin mutluluğun benim en büyük hazinem -- ve sen mutlu olmayı hak eden, dünyanın en güzel insanısın {NICKNAME}.
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC, CAMERA FROM THE SIDE at a dynamic three-quarter angle, deeply peacefully completely absorbed in her favorite personal hobby {RECIPIENT_HOBBY} in a beautiful personally meaningful intimate sanctuary space that feels entirely and unmistakably hers. Her face shows the most serene transcendent contentment and a gentle focused half-smile of pure flow state that comes only from doing something truly deeply loved and personally meaningful. Her eyes are alive with quiet passion creative energy and the meditative focus of someone completely in their element, the outside world entirely forgotten. She is wearing comfortable personal clothing in soft muted natural tones -- a favorite well-worn linen shirt in dusty sage green and comfortable trousers -- that suggest being fully at ease authentic and unselfconsciously beautiful. The setting is a deeply personal sanctuary space filled with the accumulated tools materials textures and evidence of years of devoted practice of {RECIPIENT_HOBBY}. Every surface tells a story of dedication: worn-smooth wooden handles of frequently used tools, organized collections of materials arranged with personal logic, completed projects displayed on shelves and walls with quiet pride, works-in-progress at various stages scattered with creative productive messiness. Warm rich late afternoon golden hour sunlight pours generously through a large window with slightly dusty panes, illuminating the character and her activity with the most beautiful warm amber glow that makes the entire scene feel sacred and timeless. The space around her tells the story of years of joyful dedication: well-used tools with patina of love, carefully curated materials organized by color or type, completed projects displayed proudly alongside children's drawings framed with equal care and pride. A ceramic mug of tea in a mug that clearly has sentimental value with perhaps a chip on the rim sits nearby half-finished and gone cold, suggesting hours have passed unnoticed in the blissful flow of the activity. Reading glasses pushed up onto the top of her head add authentic lived-in detail. Photographs and small personal mementos are arranged throughout the background: children's school photos at various ages, a small vase of dried flowers from a garden, a postcard from a meaningful trip tucked into a mirror frame. Through the window behind the character a beautiful cottage garden is visible with roses and lavender catching the same golden light, and several potted plants sit on the wide windowsill in mismatched vintage pots. The entire atmosphere communicates powerfully that this person has earned and deeply deserves this moment of personal joy creative expression and self-fulfillment. Botanical elements are woven organically into the setting: fresh flowers in a handmade ceramic vase, dried herb bundles hanging near the window, pressed flowers in a frame. Soft dreamy watercolor painting illustration with delicate pastel colors thoughtfully customized to complement the mood of {RECIPIENT_HOBBY}, gentle flowing contemplative brushstrokes with peaceful meditative energy, floral botanical accents woven naturally throughout, romantic ethereal atmosphere of deep personal fulfillment and the beauty of a woman fully herself, fine art watercolor on textured paper with visible grain, warm soft golden hour natural lighting, elegant feminine aesthetic that honors and celebrates individuality autonomy and the right to joy

scenes.title: Ilk Adimlarim
scenes.text: Senin ellerini ilk tuttuğumda dünya durmuştu {NICKNAME}. O küçük parmaklarım senin avuçlarında kaybolurdu, ama ben hiç korkmadım -- çünkü sen tutuyordun. Sen tuttukça cesaret buldum, sen yavaşça bıraktıkça yüreklendim. İlk adımlarım hep sana doğruydu, her düştüğümde dönüş yerim hep senin kollarındı. O ilk adımlar beni hayata taşıyan ilk cesaretim oldu. Şimdi büyüdüm belki, ama içimde o küçük çocuk hala var -- ve o çocuk hala seni arıyor, hala sana doğru yürüyor {NICKNAME}.
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC kneeling down with extraordinary tenderness on a beautiful sun-dappled cottage garden path made of warm honey-colored natural flagstones with tiny moss growing in the gaps between stones, gently and lovingly holding the tiny soft hands of a small toddler approximately one year old who is taking the most adorable wobbly uncertain brave first steps on chubby dimpled little legs. The character's hands are positioned with incredible maternal tenderness and practiced care, fingers gently but securely curled around the toddler's tiny fists providing exactly enough support for confidence without restricting the child's brave independent movement. She is wearing a beautiful comfortable soft sage green linen dress with delicate white eyelet embroidery at the neckline and sleeves rolled up to the forearms revealing warm sun-kissed skin, a thin gold chain necklace with a small heart pendant catching the light. Her face is captured in a moment of overwhelming complex emotion -- a breathtaking mixture of immense fierce pride, encouraging warmth, and barely contained tears of joy glistening at the corners of eyes that are fixed with absolute laser-focused loving attention on the small child taking these monumental first steps. Her lips are parted slightly in a whispered encouragement, every fiber of her being focused on this sacred milestone moment. The toddler is dressed in a tiny adorable white cotton romper with delicate lace trim and bare pink feet with tiny curled toes touching the warm sun-heated stones for the very first time, CAMERA LOW ANGLE from ground level looking slightly upward, the child's face showing a mixture of concentration determination and delighted surprise at this new ability. The garden path is lined on both sides with the most lush abundant cottage-garden plantings -- soft pink English David Austin roses in full bloom, white shasta daisies with golden centers, tall purple lavender bushes, and trailing fragrant sweet peas in shades of pink and lilac climbing a rustic weathered wooden trellis. Overhead a magnificent mature cherry blossom tree in full spectacular bloom creates a natural cathedral canopy of thousands of delicate pink and white blossoms, with petals drifting down in slow motion like gentle fragrant snow around the two figures, some petals caught in the character's hair and on the child's romper. Dappled warm golden afternoon sunlight filters through the blossom canopy creating beautiful circular bokeh light patterns dancing on the path and on both figures. A worn weathered wooden garden gate with a wrought iron latch stands open in the background -- a powerful visual metaphor for the beginning of life's great journey. Small butterflies in pale yellow and delicate white flutter lazily near the lavender, and a garden cat sits watching from beside a terracotta pot of geraniums. Soft dreamy watercolor painting illustration with delicate pastel colors in sage green cherry blossom pink cream and warm dappled gold, gentle flowing brushstrokes with beautiful wet-on-wet watercolor bleeding effects creating soft organic edges, abundant floral botanical elements filling every part of the composition, romantic ethereal atmosphere capturing one of life's most profound tender milestones, fine art watercolor on heavily textured paper with visible paper grain, warm soft natural afternoon dappled lighting filtering through blossoms, elegant feminine aesthetic capturing the most tender sacred moment between mother and child beginning life's journey together

scenes.title: Masal Geceleri
scenes.text: Her gece bir masal okurdun, her masal bir dünya açardı {NICKNAME}. Senin sesinle ejderhalar uysal, prensesler cesur, kurtlar dost olurdu. O gecelerde uyku değil, senin sesin en güzel ninnimdi -- sıcak, huzurlu, sonsuz. Yastığa başımı koyar koymaz dünya değişirdi, çünkü senin sesin her şeyi mümkün kılardı. Şimdi büyüdüm ama o masalların sıcaklığı hala kalbimde yaşıyor. Bazen gece yalnız kaldığımda gözlerimi kapatıp senin sesini duyar gibi olurum -- ve o an, dünya yine güvenli bir yer olur {NICKNAME}.
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC sitting on the edge of a cozy child's bed in a beautifully warm intimately lit bedroom that feels like a sanctuary of safety and imagination, CAMERA FROM BEHIND looking over the shoulder, holding a large open hardcover illustrated storybook with gorgeous visible watercolor fairy tale illustrations on its worn well-loved pages, leaning slightly forward toward a small enchanted child of about four years old who is tucked snugly under a handmade patchwork quilt sewn from squares of soft pastel fabrics in rose pink lavender cream and mint green, the child's wide eyes sparkling with absolute wonder and enchantment as they hang on every word. She is wearing comfortable cozy sleepwear in soft dusty rose color -- a well-worn cotton nightgown with delicate lace at the collar -- with a cream-colored chunky hand-knitted shawl draped warmly around the shoulders. Her face is beautifully animated and alive with the magic of storytelling, eyes expressive and dancing with the story's emotion, gentle hand gestures suggesting she is bringing the characters to life with her voice and movements, completely lost in the joy of this nightly sacred ritual. A beautiful vintage bedside lamp with a hand-painted floral ceramic base depicting tiny rosebuds and green leaves, topped with a warm cream fabric shade with scalloped edges, casts the most gentle intimate amber-golden glow across the scene. The bedroom walls are painted in the softest warm vanilla buttercream tone and lovingly decorated with framed original watercolor illustrations of fairy tale scenes -- a castle perched on cotton-candy clouds, a friendly emerald dragon curled around books, an enchanted forest with tiny glowing lanterns. A wooden bookshelf shaped like a whimsical little house is filled to overflowing with colorful well-read storybooks with creased spines. On the shelves sit childhood treasures: a snow globe containing a tiny fairy village, a delicate brass music box, small framed photographs, painted wooden figurines. A beloved threadbare teddy bear with worn velvet paws and a faded tartan bow tie sits loyally on the pillow beside the child. Magical dreamlike elements float subtly in the warm lamplight above the open book suggesting the story literally coming to life -- tiny glowing golden stars trailing stardust, wispy ethereal fairy-like shapes made of warm golden light, and tiny butterflies of pure luminescence. Cool blue moonlight filters through sheer star-patterned curtains on the window, mixing beautifully with the warm interior lamplight. A small ceramic cup of chamomile tea sits forgotten and cold on the bedside table, suggesting hours of reading. The child's small pudgy hand reaches out to touch one of the floating magical light elements with pure innocent delight. Soft dreamy watercolor painting illustration with delicate pastel colors in dusty rose warm amber buttercream vanilla and luminous gold, gentle flowing brushstrokes with magical luminous light effects, romantic ethereal enchanted fairy-tale atmosphere dripping with warmth and safety, fine art watercolor on textured paper with visible grain, warm soft golden lamplight with cool moonlight secondary, elegant feminine aesthetic with enchanting storybook quality
scenes.setting: Cocuk odasi, gece lambasi isiginda masal saati

scenes.title: Birlikte {SHARED_ACTIVITY}
scenes.text: Birlikte {SHARED_ACTIVITY}... O anlar benim için dünyanın en değerli hazinesiydi {NICKNAME}. Ne zaman önemliydi ne mekan -- önemli olan senin yanında olmaktı. Seninle {SHARED_ACTIVITY} yaparken hayat durur, dünya küçülür, sadece ikimiz kalırdık. Gülerdik, konuşurduk, bazen sessiz kalırdık -- ama o sessizlik bile doluydu, çünkü sen ordaydın. Senin ellerin çalışırken, gözlerin gülerek bana bakarken, kalbim yerinden taşacak gibi olurdu. O anıları hiç unutmayacağım {NICKNAME}, çünkü onlar beni ben yaptı, onlar hayatın ne kadar güzel olduğunu öğretti.
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC and a child of about eight or nine years old, CAMERA WIDE ESTABLISHING SHOT, joyfully and completely engaged together in their shared activity {SHARED_ACTIVITY} in a beautiful warmly lit inviting setting overflowing with life and genuine human connection. Both figures are showing genuine unforced radiant happiness, deep mutual connection, and the pure undiluted joy that only comes from spending truly present quality time with someone you love. The character is wearing comfortable casual clothing in soft warm earth tones -- a linen blouse with rolled sleeves and comfortable trousers -- with sleeves pushed up suggesting active enthusiastic hands-on participation. The child is animatedly joyfully involved in {SHARED_ACTIVITY}, frequently looking up at the character with absolute unguarded adoration and shared excitement, their whole body language expressing pure happiness. The setting is a warm inviting beautifully detailed space perfectly suited for {SHARED_ACTIVITY} together, rendered with enough versatility for prompt-architect to adapt: if cooking they stand side by side at a rustic farmhouse kitchen counter dusted with flour with copper pots hanging overhead and fresh herbs in terracotta pots on the windowsill, if gardening they kneel together in a lush garden bed with matching gloves and a wicker basket overflowing with flowers, if walking they stride hand in hand through a tree-lined park path with dappled light, if baking they wear matching aprons both laughing at a shared mishap. Regardless of the specific activity the emotional core remains the same: two people completely fully present and deeply connected in a timeless moment of shared joy where nothing else matters. Warm golden late afternoon light bathes the entire scene in honey-colored warmth creating long soft shadows. Small authentic details show the passage of time and the beloved ritual nature of this activity -- worn tools used many times before, a familiar rhythm between the two figures suggesting this happens regularly and is treasured by both. Deep laughter lines around the character's eyes show genuine deep happiness. The child's body language shows complete comfort absolute trust and belonging from unconditional love. Abundant botanical elements frame the scene with climbing roses trailing wisteria or seasonal flowers creating a natural bower. The atmosphere radiates the irreplaceable infinite value of time spent together. Soft dreamy watercolor painting illustration with delicate pastel colors in warm earth tones sage green dusty pink golden amber and cream, gentle flowing brushstrokes with joyful vibrant energy, abundant floral botanical framing elements, romantic ethereal atmosphere celebrating the sacred priceless nature of shared moments between mother and child, fine art watercolor on textured paper, warm soft natural golden afternoon lighting, elegant feminine aesthetic that is a love letter to togetherness

scenes.title: {RECIPIENT_HOBBY} ve Sen
scenes.text: {NICKNAME}, sen bana {RECIPIENT_HOBBY} sevgisini öğrettin. Küçük yaşlarda senin yanında oturur, seni izler, o dünyanın büyüsüne kapılırdım. Seninle birlikte keşfettiğim {RECIPIENT_HOBBY} dünyası, hayatımın en güzel armağanlarından biri oldu. Senin sabrınla, senin rehberliğinle, o küçük ellerimle ilk denemelerimi yaparken nasıl da gülümserdin. Hiç kızmadın, hiç acelemizin olmadığı o anlarda sadece sevgiyle öğrettin. O öğretiler hala benimle {NICKNAME} -- her {RECIPIENT_HOBBY} gördüğümde kalbim seni anıyor.
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC and a child of about seven years old sitting closely together in a warm beautifully lit intimate setting, sharing a tender teaching and learning moment centered around {RECIPIENT_HOBBY}. The mother is patiently lovingly guiding the child's small hands or showing them a technique or skill related to {RECIPIENT_HOBBY}, her expression radiating infinite patience and quiet pride as she watches her child learn. Her posture is open and encouraging, CAMERA HIGH ANGLE from slightly above looking down, leaning slightly toward the child with her body language communicating complete attention and gentle guidance. She wears a comfortable soft cardigan in muted rose over a cream blouse, sleeves pushed up, fully engaged. The child's face shows intense adorable concentration, small tongue perhaps poking out slightly in effort, eyes darting between the activity and the mother's hands trying to imitate. The setting reflects the world of {RECIPIENT_HOBBY} -- relevant tools, materials, and objects of the hobby surround them in an organized but lived-in creative space. The tools show evidence of years of loving use -- worn handles, faded labels, the patina of devoted practice. Between them on a work surface lies evidence of both the mother's skilled completed work and the child's charming beginner attempts side by side -- the contrast itself deeply moving and beautiful. Warm afternoon sunlight streams through a nearby window framed by trailing ivy and small potted herbs on the sill, casting golden dappled light across both figures and the workspace. A small vase of fresh wildflowers -- daisies, cornflowers, sprigs of lavender -- sits on the windowsill adding color and life. On a shelf behind them, framed family photographs share space with completed hobby projects displayed with quiet pride. A cup of tea in a floral ceramic mug and a glass of juice for the child sit forgotten nearby. The scene captures the profound beauty of knowledge and passion being passed from one generation to the next through gentle patient loving hands. Small authentic details: a measuring tape draped over a chair, a reference book open to a well-thumbed page, pencil marks or material scraps that tell the story of many previous sessions together. Botanical watercolor elements frame the edges -- trailing vines, scattered petals, small watercolor flower studies. Soft dreamy watercolor painting illustration with delicate pastel colors in warm honey rose soft green cream and golden amber, gentle flowing brushstrokes with tender intimate energy, abundant floral botanical accents throughout, romantic ethereal atmosphere of intergenerational love and learning, fine art watercolor on textured paper with visible grain, warm soft natural afternoon lighting, elegant feminine aesthetic celebrating the sacred act of a mother sharing her world with her child

scenes.title: Soframiz Hic Bos Kalmadi
scenes.text: Evimiz her zaman sıcaktı {NICKNAME}. Senin ellerinin dokunduğu her şey canlanır, her köşe sevgiyle dolardı. {SHARED_ACTIVITY} yaparken doldurduğun o ev, sevgiyle yoğrulmuş bir yuvaydı. Soframız hiç boş kalmadı -- ne yemek eksik oldu ne sevgi. Misafir geldiğinde de, sadece ikimiz kaldığımda da, o sofra hep aynı sıcaklığı taşıdı. Çünkü sen sadece bir ev kurmadın {NICKNAME}, sen bir yuva yardın. Ve o yuvanın sıcaklığı, nereye gidersem gideyim, hep benimle.
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC in a warm inviting beautifully detailed kitchen and dining area, creating a scene of domestic warmth and nourishment that radiates love from every surface and corner. She stands at a large rustic farmhouse dining table covered with a vintage hand-embroidered white linen tablecloth with delicate floral cross-stitch borders, setting out dishes and food with practiced loving care, her movements showing the easy grace of someone who has performed this ritual of love thousands of times. She wears a comfortable well-worn floral apron over a soft cream blouse with rolled sleeves, the apron slightly dusted suggesting active cooking. Her expression shows deep quiet satisfaction and maternal warmth -- the serene contentment of a woman who knows that feeding her family is an act of pure love. The table is set beautifully but not formally -- mismatched vintage china with rose patterns, handmade ceramic bowls, embroidered cloth napkins in soft pink, a bread basket lined with a gingham cloth, a pitcher of water with sliced lemon and mint. In the background, the kitchen is a warm haven of domestic life with copper pots hanging from a wrought-iron rack above the stove, shelves of spice jars with handwritten labels, a well-seasoned cast iron pan, wooden utensils in a ceramic crock. Visual hints of {SHARED_ACTIVITY} are woven into the scene -- elements or tools related to the shared activity visible in the background or on surfaces, showing that this activity is part of the fabric of this home's daily life and rhythm. Fresh herbs grow in small terracotta pots lined along the windowsill above the sink -- basil, rosemary, thyme, mint -- their green leaves catching the warm light. A wooden cutting board with freshly sliced bread sits on the counter, next to a jar of homemade preserves with a cloth top and twine. Steam rises from dishes on the table carrying implied warmth and fragrance. Through the kitchen window above the sink, a cottage garden is visible with climbing roses and a vegetable patch. On the wall, a collection of family photographs in mismatched frames spans decades of family meals and gatherings, CAMERA FROM FRONT LOW ANGLE looking up, and a child's drawing of a house with a huge heart is pinned with a magnet to the refrigerator. A vase of fresh sunflowers and wildflowers sits at the center of the table as a casual but beautiful centerpiece. Warm golden late afternoon light floods through the window and through a glass-paned kitchen door, bathing everything in honey-colored warmth and creating beautiful shadows. The entire scene is an ode to the home as a sanctuary built not with bricks but with love, meals shared, laughter echoed off these walls, and the irreplaceable warmth of a mother's nurturing presence. Soft dreamy watercolor painting illustration with delicate pastel colors in warm cream golden amber soft terracotta dusty rose and sage green, gentle flowing brushstrokes with warm domestic energy, abundant botanical elements including fresh herbs flowers and garden views, romantic ethereal atmosphere of home as sanctuary, fine art watercolor on textured paper with visible grain, warm soft natural golden kitchen lighting, elegant feminine aesthetic celebrating the sacred art of nurturing through nourishment and home-making
scenes.setting: Sicak mutfak ve sofra, ev sicakligi

scenes.title: Gozyaslarimi Sen Sildin
scenes.text: Sen ağladığımda benim de dünyam kararırdı {NICKNAME}. Ama sen hep oradaydın -- sessizce, sabırla, sonsuz bir sevgiyle. Gözyaşlarımı silip 'geçti gitti canım' derdin, ve o iki kelime dünyanın en güçlü ilacıydı. Hiç sormadan, hiç yargılamadan, sadece sarılırdın. Senin kollarında her şey düzelebilirdi, her yara kapanabilirdi, her karanlık aydınlanabilirdi. Ben o kolları hiç unutmadım {NICKNAME} -- ve ne kadar büyürsem büyüyeyim, hala orada olmak istiyorum. Çünkü senin kollarında dünya hep güvenli bir yerdi.
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC sitting on a deep comfortable upholstered armchair with soft worn velvet fabric in a muted dusty rose color, in a warm cozy softly lit living room, tenderly cradling a young child of about six or seven years old in her lap in the most protective fiercely loving embrace imaginable. One hand gently softly wiping a tear from the child's flushed pink cheek with the pad of her thumb with the most incredible delicacy, the other arm wrapped completely and firmly around the child's small trembling body pulling them deep into the warmth and absolute safety of the maternal embrace. She is wearing a soft oversized cashmere sweater in the most comforting warm rose-pink color that looks incredibly soft and tactile. The child's face is turned into her chest seeking refuge, eyes red-rimmed from crying, but the expression is already beginning to transform -- the storm of tears passing, replaced by the first fragile hints of a small brave watery smile emerging as the mother's comfort takes effect. Her expression shows infinite patient compassionate wisdom and quiet absolute reassurance -- gentle knowing eyes that communicate without words that everything will be alright, that this too shall pass, that love conquers all pain. A slight press of her lips on the child's warm forehead suggests a healing kiss. The cozy living room surrounds them in a protective embrace: a soft thick chunky hand-knitted throw blanket in cream wool with cable-knit pattern draped over the armchair, a blue and white porcelain vase of fresh white garden roses and pink ranunculus flowers on an antique dark wooden side table, next to a family photograph in an ornate silver frame. Warm late afternoon golden sunlight streams through sheer linen curtains creating a protective luminous cocoon around the embracing figures. A small adhesive bandage decorated with tiny cartoon stars is visible on the child's scraped knee. Several crumpled tissues are scattered on the armchair arm, CAMERA CLOSE-UP focusing on face and upper body, and a glass of water with a straw sits on the side table. A beloved well-worn stuffed elephant with a sewn-up ear lies on the floor where it was dropped in haste when the child ran to the character's waiting arms. A soft thick Persian-style rug in faded rose and cream tones covers the warm wooden floorboards, and a bookshelf with family photos and well-read books lines the wall behind them. Soft dreamy watercolor painting illustration with delicate pastel colors in warm comforting rose cream gold amber and soft blush, gentle flowing brushstrokes with deep emotional resonance and visible watercolor blooms, romantic intimate profoundly protective atmosphere, fine art watercolor on textured paper with visible tooth, warm soft afternoon natural lighting creating a golden protective cocoon, elegant feminine aesthetic capturing the sacred eternal privilege of comforting a child

scenes.title: O Ani Hic Unutmadim
scenes.text: Bir anı var ki kalbimde hep yaşıyor {NICKNAME}... {SPECIAL_MEMORY} ...O an, seninle geçen her günün ne kadar değerli olduğunu hatırlatıyor bana. Zaman akıp gidiyor, günler birbirine karışıyor, ama bazı anlar var ki ebedi kalıyor -- cam gibi berrak, altın gibi değerli. Bu an onlardan biri. Ve her hatırladığımda kalbim yeniden ısıyor, gözlerim yeniden doluyor, dudaklarımda aynı gülümseme beliriyor. O anı hayatımın en değerli sayfalarından biri oldu {NICKNAME}.
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC, CAMERA OVERHEAD looking down, captured in a deeply dreamy ethereal memory-like scene suffused with a profound nostalgic atmosphere that makes the viewer feel they are looking directly into a treasured memory being lovingly replayed in the mind's eye. The entire image has a distinctive intentional faded vintage quality with extraordinarily soft focus edges that blur and dissolve organically into pure watercolor washes at the borders of the composition, as if the memory is a precious jewel floating in an infinite ocean of love and time. The character is captured in a moment of pure genuine unguarded radiant happiness, engaged in an activity with a child or family member -- the specific activity left open and universal enough to accommodate any personal memory described by {SPECIAL_MEMORY}. Her expression shows the pure transparent unselfconscious joy of someone who does not yet know that this ordinary moment is becoming an extraordinary lifelong treasured memory -- she is simply fully completely alive in the moment, laughing or smiling with the easy grace of someone surrounded by love. The setting has a universal warm quality adaptable to any personal memory -- it could be a sun-drenched kitchen, a sparkling beach, a cozy living room during a holiday, or a garden in full summer bloom -- the details deliberately soft and suggestive rather than specific, allowing the viewer to project their own memories. The lighting is the distinctive warm golden quality of remembered moments -- that magical quality where everything in retrospect seems more beautiful more vivid more precious than it perhaps was in reality, because love and time have polished the memory like sea glass. The edges of the entire composition dissolve into the most beautiful soft watercolor washes of warm pink antique gold and gentle lavender, as if the memory exists on an island of clarity surrounded by an infinite tender sea of emotion and time. Delicate symbolic details are scattered poetically through the scene: old photographs with curled edges scattered like fallen leaves around the margins, a vintage clock with no hands suggesting time itself has stopped, tiny golden sparkles and motes of light drifting through the scene. A warm honey-colored vignette effect draws the viewer's eye to the central emotional moment. Film-grain-like watercolor paper texture adds to the nostalgic quality. The overall feeling is of reaching back lovingly through time to hold onto something infinitely precious, and discovering with grateful tears that love has preserved it perfectly. Soft dreamy watercolor painting illustration with a distinctive nostalgic intentionally faded palette of warm sepia antique rose dusty gold soft lavender and cream, gentle flowing brushstrokes with intentional beautiful soft-focus dreamy quality and gorgeous watercolor bleeding effects radiating outward, romantic ethereal memory-like atmosphere with luminous quality of vintage photographs, fine art watercolor on aged textured paper with warm tea-stained edges, warm soft diffused nostalgic lighting that seems to come from within the memory itself, elegant deeply emotional feminine aesthetic that captures and honors the sacred nature of personal memories

scenes.title: Guclu Kadin
scenes.text: {RECIPIENT_NAME}, sen hayatın en zor anlarında bile gülümsedin. {SHARED_ACTIVITY} yaparken bile o güçlü duruşunu hiç kaybetmedin -- yorgun gözlerinin ardında sakladığın o yılmaz iradeyi her zaman hissettim. Hayat sana ne atarsa atsın, sen hep ayakta kaldın -- bizim için, sevdiklerin için, kendin için. Belki kimse görmedi o sessiz kahramanlıklarını, ama ben gördüm {NICKNAME}. Uykusuz geceler, görünmez yükler, sessiz gözyaşları -- hepsini taşıdın ve hiç pes etmedin. Sen benim hayatımdaki en güçlü, en cesur, en yılmaz insan. Ve ben seninle gurur duyuyorum -- her gün, her an, sonsuza dek.
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC, CAMERA FROM THE SIDE at a dynamic three-quarter angle, standing at a large rain-streaked window in a quiet contemplative dimly lit room during a dramatic evening rainstorm, positioned in a powerful three-quarter view that shows both her strength and her vulnerability simultaneously. One hand is pressed gently flat against the cool wet window glass with fingers slightly spread, watching the rain trace intricate paths down the glass, the other arm wrapped around herself in a self-comforting but resolute embrace that speaks of both weariness and unbreakable determination. Her faint reflection is visible in the dark rain-streaked window glass creating a powerful haunting double image. She is wearing simple comfortable clothing in muted deep warm tones suggesting the end of a long exhausting day -- a dark burgundy soft sweater and comfortable dark trousers, her hair slightly loosened from the day's style. The expression on her face is extraordinarily complex and deeply human: visible genuine tiredness with slight lavender shadows under her eyes, but simultaneously showing the most remarkable quiet formidable inner strength and absolutely unbroken indomitable spirit in the firm set of her jaw and the steady clear wise gaze looking out through the storm. In the room behind her, subtle visual elements hint at {SHARED_ACTIVITY} -- perhaps related objects on a nearby surface, tools or materials that connect to the shared activity, showing that even in moments of exhaustion she maintains the rituals and rhythms that define her loving home life. The room is softly lit by a single warm table lamp casting gentle amber light contrasting with the cold blue-grey storm light from the window. On a nearby worn desk sits evidence of the day's demands: a closed laptop, scattered papers, reading glasses set down with temples still open. Pinned to a cork board on the wall is a child's crayon drawing with the words CANIM ANNEM surrounded by hearts and flowers -- a powerful reminder of purpose. Rain streams dramatically down the window glass creating beautiful organic patterns that catch and refract the warm lamplight into tiny scattered prisms. Distant lightning briefly illuminates the landscape outside revealing a garden bent but not broken by the storm -- a visual metaphor for the character herself. Her posture tells the story of someone who carries enormous weight but refuses to be crushed, who bends but never breaks. A soft hand-knitted blanket in cream and grey lies folded on a nearby armchair, waiting. A small framed family photograph on the side table catches the warm lamplight. Despite the fierce storm and evident exhaustion, she radiates quiet indomitable sacred feminine strength. Soft dreamy watercolor painting illustration with a more dramatic emotionally complex muted palette of deep indigo warm amber charcoal grey soft rose and touches of warm burnished gold, gentle flowing brushstrokes with dramatic atmospheric rain effects in beautiful watercolor washes, moody contemplative but ultimately deeply hopeful atmosphere, fine art watercolor on textured paper with beautiful water-effect techniques, warm intimate interior lamplight contrasting with cool blue-grey storm light creating chiaroscuro depth, elegant feminine aesthetic with raw emotional honesty and profound respect for quiet unseen everyday heroism
scenes.setting: Yagmurlu gece, pencere onunde guclu durus

scenes.title: O Hatira Hep Benimle
scenes.text: Yıllar geçti ama o anı hala gözlerimin önünde {NICKNAME}... {SPECIAL_MEMORY} derken geçen zamanı bile fark edemiyorum. Çünkü seninle geçen her an zamansız. O hatıra benim için bir pusula gibi -- ne zaman kaybolsam, ne zaman yorulsam, o ana dönüp yolumu bulurum. Senin gülümenin sıcaklığını, o andaki huzuru, her şeyin yerli yerinde olduğu o anı hep kalbimde taşıyorum. Zaman geçse de, mesafeler artsa da, o hatıra hep benimle {NICKNAME}. Çünkü gerçek sevgi zamana yenilmez.
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC captured in a profoundly artistic split-composition scene that bridges past and present, memory and reality, creating a visual poem about how love preserves moments across time. The image is divided by a gentle organic watercolor wash -- not a hard line but a soft bleeding transition -- with the left portion rendered in warm sepia and antique golden tones representing the cherished past memory described by {SPECIAL_MEMORY}, and the right portion in present-day soft natural colors showing the same woman today. In the memory half (left), a younger version of the character is captured in a moment of pure joy and connection, the scene deliberately soft and dreamlike with edges dissolving into golden watercolor mist, the colors warm and amber-toned like a sunlit vintage photograph. In the present half (right), the character sits in a comfortable armchair in a cozy room, eyes gently closed, a soft nostalgic smile on her lips, CAMERA WIDE ESTABLISHING SHOT, one hand resting over her heart, the other holding a treasured photograph or keepsake that connects to the memory. Her present expression shows deep peaceful reverie -- she is not sad but profoundly grateful, visibly warmed from within by the act of remembering. The transition zone between past and present is the most beautifully rendered part -- watercolor washes of gold rose and lavender bleed and merge, with symbolic elements floating in this liminal space: scattered dried flower petals, fragments of old photographs, tiny golden sparkles representing the magic of memory, wisps of warmth flowing from past to present. The present-day room is warmly lit by a single lamp and the last light of sunset through a window, with personal mementos on shelves and tables: framed photographs showing family through the years, a collection of meaningful small objects, fresh flowers in a vase echoing dried flowers from the memory side. A cup of tea sits steaming nearby, a knitted blanket draped over the chair. The garden outside the window echoes the setting of the memory but in present day, suggesting continuity and the enduring nature of the places where love took root. The entire composition communicates that the most precious memories are not trapped in the past but live on in us, warming us from within every day. Soft dreamy watercolor painting illustration with a dual-palette approach: warm sepia antique gold and rose for the memory half transitioning to soft natural cream sage rose and amber for the present half, gentle flowing brushstrokes with extraordinary watercolor blending in the transition zone, romantic ethereal nostalgic atmosphere, fine art watercolor on textured paper with visible grain and intentional aging effects on the memory side, warm soft dual lighting from memory's golden glow and present's gentle lamplight, elegant deeply emotional feminine aesthetic celebrating how love makes memories eternal

scenes.title: Senden Ogrendiklerim
scenes.text: Sen bana sadece {RECIPIENT_HOBBY} öğretmedin {NICKNAME}. Sabır öğrettin, sevgi öğrettin, hayata tutunmayı öğrettin. {RECIPIENT_HOBBY} yaparken öğrendiğim o disiplin, o ince işçilik, o adanmışlık -- bunların hepsi aslında hayat dersleriydi. Senden öğrendim ki sevmek bir sanattır ve sen o sanatın ustasıydın. Senden öğrendim ki güçlü olmak ağlamaya engel değildir. Senden öğrendim ki küçük şeyler en büyük şeylere dönüşebilir -- bir gülümseme, bir dokunma, bir sofrada oturmak. Her öğrendiğim şey, aslında senin sevginin bir yansıması {NICKNAME}.
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC and a grown-up young adult child, CAMERA TRACKING from behind following the character, walking together through a magnificent garden at warm golden sunset, engaged in deep meaningful conversation, the young adult listening with mature attentive appreciation as the character shares wisdom and life experience. They walk arm in arm along a winding garden path bordered by tall blooming flowers -- hollyhocks, delphiniums, foxgloves, and climbing roses creating walls of color on either side. The character is wearing an elegant but comfortable outfit in soft warm tones -- a linen blazer over a cream blouse, a silk scarf in muted rose tones -- looking beautiful and dignified. Her face shows the wisdom and warmth of a life well-lived, speaking with animated gentle hands, eyes bright with intelligence and love. The young adult walks close, occasionally nodding, their expression showing deep respect admiration and the conscious recognition of receiving something precious -- the distilled wisdom of a lifetime. Visual elements connecting to {RECIPIENT_HOBBY} are woven naturally into the garden setting -- perhaps hobby-related plants or objects visible along the path, a small studio or workspace visible through the garden's edge, or the character gesturing toward something that represents a lesson learned through her passion. The garden itself becomes a metaphor for what the mother has cultivated: patience (mature slow-growing trees), beauty (carefully tended flower beds), resilience (plants that bloom after harsh winters), generosity (flowers that spill over the path). A weathered wooden bench sits under a magnificent old oak tree ahead of them on the path, suggesting a destination for sitting and talking. The sunset paints everything in the most extraordinary warm golden-pink light, long shadows stretching behind them on the path they have already walked -- a visual metaphor for the journey of life shared between them. Butterflies and small birds move through the garden catching the last warm light. A pair of gardening gloves and pruning shears rest on the bench, suggesting the character tends this garden with the same devotion she tends her family. Fallen leaves and petals carpet the path in gold and rose, beautiful in their descent. Soft dreamy watercolor painting illustration with delicate pastel colors in warm sunset gold deep rose soft amber cream and sage green, gentle flowing brushstrokes with warm luminous sunset light effects, abundant botanical elements creating a paradise garden setting, romantic ethereal atmosphere of wisdom being lovingly passed between generations, fine art watercolor on textured paper with visible grain, warm soft golden sunset lighting with long dramatic shadows, elegant feminine aesthetic celebrating the mother as teacher guide and eternal source of wisdom

scenes.title: Seni Cok Seviyorum!
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC and a grown-up young adult child locked in the most emotional beautiful tight overwhelmingly loving long embrace in a magnificent paradise garden at the transcendent golden hour of sunset, CAMERA LOW ANGLE from ground level looking slightly upward, both figures holding each other with every fiber of their being with genuine deep raw overwhelming love and gratitude as if they never want to let go. {RECIPIENT_NAME} -- the character's eyes are peacefully blissfully closed with the most serene content deeply fulfilled radiant smile -- the smile of a woman who knows with absolute certainty that she is loved, that her life's work of love has borne the most beautiful fruit, that everything was worth it. One of her hands gently instinctively cradles the back of the young adult's head in that ancient universal parental gesture of protective tenderness. The young adult has their face nestled into the character's shoulder with arms wrapped completely around her in a full desperate grateful heart embrace, their hands gripping the back of her clothing as if holding on to the most precious thing in existence. Tears of pure joy are visible on both faces, catching the golden sunset light like tiny diamonds or liquid gold. They stand beneath a breathtakingly spectacular garden archway -- a massive weathered wooden pergola completely and utterly covered in cascading waterfalls of wisteria in soft purple lilac and white, intertwined with climbing roses in the most delicate pink cream and peach, their combined weight making the ancient structure bow gracefully. Golden blazing sunset light floods through the millions of hanging blossoms and translucent petals creating an absolutely heavenly ethereal celestial glow that surrounds both embracing figures like a visible aura of love, every petal backlit and glowing, every shadow soft and warm. Hundreds of flower petals drift gently continuously through the warm still golden evening air in slow hypnotic motion -- soft pink rose petals, tiny cream jasmine flowers, purple wisteria florets, and white orange blossom petals -- creating a natural confetti of overwhelming beauty falling like nature's own blessing. The ground beneath their feet is thickly carpeted with a deep fragrant layer of accumulated fallen petals in pink cream lavender and soft peach. A beautiful weathered wooden garden bench nearby holds a gorgeously wrapped gift with cream paper and a satin rose-gold ribbon and a bow, beside a handwritten card in an envelope and a hand-gathered bouquet of garden flowers tied with kitchen twine. The most magnificent warm golden-pink sunset light envelops both figures so completely that they seem to glow from within. Tiny magical fireflies are beginning to appear in the darkening lavender edges of the garden, their gentle pulsing warm lights like earthbound stars. Birds settle into nests in the flowering archway above, their final evening songs creating a natural vespers. In the far background the sun sits magnificently on the horizon painting the entire vast sky in spectacular gradient of deep burnished gold into warm coral into soft rose into gentle lavender into the first deep blue hints of approaching peaceful night. The entire scene is the visual equivalent of the words I love you spoken with an entire lifetime of meaning behind them -- every petal every ray of light every tear every smile combining into a single transcendent moment of pure perfect eternal love. Soft dreamy watercolor painting illustration with the most breathtakingly beautiful rich warm sunset palette of deep burnished gold warm amber coral rose pink soft lavender cream and touches of celestial violet, gentle flowing luminous brushstrokes with radiant golden light effects and soft color bleeding watercolor techniques, the maximum possible density of floral botanical elements creating an absolute paradise bower of flowers, the most romantic ethereal heavenly atmosphere achievable, fine art watercolor on premium heavily textured cold-pressed paper with visible tooth, the most magnificent golden hour natural lighting with warm lens flare and celestial glow, the ultimate elegant feminine emotional aesthetic creating a scene of pure distilled transcendent eternal love
